ecarx.carext.vehicle.module

Annotation Type IDriveMode.DriveModeSelect


  • @Retention(value=SOURCE)
public static @interface IDriveMode.DriveModeSelect

    • Field Detail

      • DRIVE_MODE_SELECTION_ECO
